sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116254" key="w)nh/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠν-ήτωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, later form of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὠνητής, ὀπωρῶν ὠνήτωρ οἱ ἀγοραῖοι, σὺ δὲ ὀπωρώνης λέγε</foreign> Thom.Mag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0003.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.258R" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.258R.</biblScope> </bibl> </entryFree>
